subcodes.first_line: O assemblage that shineth even as a candle! His honor Amin hath made mention of your goodly qualities, that, praise be to God, ye are united and in harmony [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای جمع چون شمع جناب امین ذکر خیر شما را مینماید که الحمد الله متفقید و متحد و
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @business; financial; property matters, @love of God, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause
